lines.english: How did Sam get his money back?
lines.chinese: 萨姆是怎么把钱找回来的？
lines.raw: How did Sam get his money back? | 萨姆是怎么把钱找回来的？

lines.english: The whole village soon learnt that a large sum of money had been lost.
lines.chinese: 整个村子很快就知道一大笔钱丢了。
lines.raw: The whole village soon learnt that a large sum of money had been lost. | 整个村子很快就知道一大笔钱丢了。
Sam Benton, the local butcher, | 当地屠夫萨姆·本顿

lines.english: had lost his wallet while taking his savings to the post office.
lines.chinese: 在去邮局存钱的路上丢了钱包。
lines.raw: had lost his wallet while taking his savings to the post office. | 在去邮局存钱的路上丢了钱包。

lines.english: Sam was sure that the wallet must have been found by one of the villagers,
lines.chinese: 萨姆确信钱包一定是被村里人捡走了，
lines.raw: Sam was sure that the wallet must have been found by one of the villagers, | 萨姆确信钱包一定是被村里人捡走了，

lines.english: but it was not returned to him.
lines.raw: but it was not returned to him. | 但一直没有还给他。

lines.english: Three months passed, and then one morning, Sam found his wallet outside his front door.
lines.chinese: 三个月过去了，一天早上，萨姆在自家门外发现了他的钱包。
lines.raw: Three months passed, and then one morning, Sam found his wallet outside his front door. | 三个月过去了，一天早上，萨姆在自家门外发现了他的钱包。

lines.english: It had been wrapped up in newspaper and it contained half the money he had lost,
lines.chinese: 钱包用报纸包着，里面有他丢失的一半钱，
lines.raw: It had been wrapped up in newspaper and it contained half the money he had lost, | 钱包用报纸包着，里面有他丢失的一半钱，

lines.english: together with a note which said:
lines.chinese: 还有一张纸条，上面写着：
lines.raw: together with a note which said: | 还有一张纸条，上面写着：

lines.english: 'A thief, yes, but only 50 per cent a thief!'
lines.raw: 'A thief, yes, but only 50 per cent a thief!' | “我是个小偷，但只算50%的小偷！”
Two months later, | 两个月后，

lines.english: some more money was sent to Sam with another note:
lines.chinese: 又有一些钱连同另一张纸条寄给了萨姆：
lines.raw: some more money was sent to Sam with another note: | 又有一些钱连同另一张纸条寄给了萨姆：
'Only 25 per cent a thief now!' | “现在我只算25%的小偷了！”

lines.english: In time, all Sam's money was paid back in this way.
lines.chinese: 渐渐地，萨姆所有的钱都以这种方式还了回来。
lines.raw: In time, all Sam's money was paid back in this way. | 渐渐地，萨姆所有的钱都以这种方式还了回来。

lines.english: The last note said: 'I am 100 per cent honest now!'
lines.chinese: 最后一张纸条写着：“我现在是100%的诚实人！”
lines.raw: The last note said: 'I am 100 per cent honest now!' | 最后一张纸条写着：“我现在是100%的诚实人！”
